task:
Author the file cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/e2e-evidence.md (create the directory if needed). Write ONLY under cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/** — do not touch any other path. The file must contain, in EXACTLY this order:

1. A top-level heading line: `# E2E evidence`
2. A line: `- Priority: orchestration-e2e-test`
3. A heading line: `## Loop stages observed`
4. Under that heading, a Markdown checklist with one line per loop stage that was actually exercised in this run, in this order:
   - [x] directive issued
   - [x] builder dispatched
   - [x] monitor saw the completion marker
   - [x] verify verdict
   - [x] commit

Acceptance criteria: the file exists at the exact path; the heading text, the Priority line, and the section heading match the spec strings verbatim; the checklist contains exactly the five stage lines above in order. Keep it minimal — no extra prose, no other files. What must not break: do not write outside cocoder/audit/orchestration-e2e/**; do not modify control-plane code (runner, monitor, commit-gate, personas, Plays).
